nasb.text: And He was king in Jeshurun, When the heads of the people were gathered, The tribes of Israel together.

esv.text: Thus the Lord  became king in Jeshurun, when the heads of the people were gathered, all the tribes of Israel together.

cnv.text: 人民的眾首領，以色列的各支派， 一同會合的時候， 耶和華就在耶書崙作王了。

ccb.text: 百姓的众首领齐聚， 以色列各支派集合之时， 耶和华在耶书仑做王。”
